title: PPIP - Setting persistence when Share Data toggle is OFF
scenario: Share Data toggle remains persistently OFF after app restart when user opted out during onboarding
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time and complete the onboarding flow.
2. On the data sharing prompt, tap "Continue as Guest".
3. On the "Share Data" screen, ensure the toggle is set to OFF (skip location permission if prompted on iOS).
4. Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
5. Verify the "Share Data" toggle is OFF and the description text is correct.
6. Force close and restart the Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
expected: The "Share Data" toggle remains persistently in the OFF state after restarting the app.
